center.name: Ptari-tepui
center.summary: Ptari-tepui是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-hooded thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ptaritepui: Ptari-tepui and tepuis of Gran Sabana in southeastern Bolívar The black-hooded thrush inhabits humid montane forest, secondary forest, and shade coffee plantations. In Colombia it also occurs in scrublands. In Venezuela it ranges in elevation between north of the Orinoco River and between south of it. It ranges between in Colombia and between in Brazil
